## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` are clean
      (`src/ experiment_runner/ tests/`).
- [ ] A `@pytest.mark.unit` test was added for the change.
- [ ] `pytest -m unit` passes (and `pytest -m integration` if the pipeline was
      touched).
- [ ] The documentation is updated.
- [ ] For a re-implemented method: the paper is cited and any known deviation
      from the original is noted (see the
      [Disclaimer](../docs/source/disclaimer.md)).
